summary: Iteration 87: 21-Day Living Forecast module fully tested. All 32 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend panel loads correctly with all features working: 5 KPIs, 21-day calendar grid with mini coverage graphs, day card click expands coverage detail, AI Notes tab with form and active notes list, AI Insights tab with peak/low days and pattern analysis, Coverage View tab with hourly stacked bar charts per outlet.

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent 'Failed to fetch dynamically imported module' error on first load after idle. Resolved by frontend restart. May be Vite HMR caching issue.

seed_data_creation: Created test notes via API: 2026-04-22 bar 'VIP group arriving', 2026-04-25 spa 'TEST_note - VIP spa day expected'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 87 verified 21-Day Living Forecast module. Backend endpoints: GET /api/forecast-21/forecast (returns 21 days with data_source='live_mongodb'), GET /api/forecast-21/forecast/day/{date} (day detail with ai_adjustments), POST /api/forecast-21/notes (create AI-readable note), GET /api/forecast-21/notes (list notes), GET /api/forecast-21/coverage/{outlet}/{date} (hourly coverage with status). Frontend panel at sidebar '21-Day Forecast' shows: 5 KPIs (21-Day Revenue, Avg Occupancy, Labor Cost, Labor Budget, Rooms Sold), Calendar tab with 7-column grid and mini coverage graphs per day, Coverage View tab with hourly stacked bars per outlet, AI Notes tab with form and active notes, AI Insights tab with peak/low days and AI pattern analysis. DOW patterns working (Saturday highest, Monday lowest). Manager notes trigger AI adjustments (e.g., 'closed' sets forecast to 0). surface_3d has ~1785 data points for 3D visualization.

backend_api_tests: Forecast base_metrics has real room counts from MongoDB (31/65 occupied)
Summary has total_revenue, avg_occupancy, peak_days, low_days
AI insights has peak_pattern, gap_alert, labor_efficiency
surface_3d has >1000 data points with correct structure
Each day has occupancy, revenue, covers, labor, outlets breakdown
Each outlet has hourly_flow with staff_needed and staff_scheduled
GET /api/forecast-21/forecast/day/2026-04-21 returns day detail with ai_adjustments
Coverage endpoint returns status (optimal/understaffed/overstaffed) per hour
DOW patterns: Saturday shows higher occupancy factor than Monday
frontend_tests: Panel shows 5 summary KPIs (21-Day Revenue, Avg Occupancy, Labor Cost, Labor Budget, Rooms Sold)
Calendar tab shows 21 day cards in 7-column grid with mini coverage graphs
Each day card shows date, occupancy %, revenue, labor cost, and mini bar chart
Clicking a day card expands the Coverage Detail view with hourly breakdowns
Coverage Detail shows stacked bar charts per outlet with needed vs scheduled
Notes tab has form to add AI-readable notes with date and outlet selector
Notes tab shows Active Notes list with existing notes
Insights tab shows Peak Revenue Days and Low Volume Days
Insights tab shows AI Pattern Analysis section
Coverage View tab shows hourly coverage for multiple days

21_day_forecast_backend.details: All endpoints return correct data. Forecast pulls real MongoDB data (hk_rooms for room counts). DOW patterns apply correctly. Manager notes trigger AI adjustments.

21_day_forecast_frontend.details: Panel loads with all features: KPIs, calendar grid, coverage graphs, notes form, insights. All tabs functional.

ai_notes_system.details: Notes can be created via API and appear in frontend. AI reads notes and adjusts forecast (e.g., 'closed' sets forecast to 0).

coverage_analysis.details: Hourly coverage endpoint returns staff_needed, staff_scheduled, gap, and status per hour. Frontend displays stacked bar charts.

regression_other_apis.details: GM Flash, Chef Daily, Guest Intel, Health endpoints all still working
